title: FINAL 2026 Oscar Predictions: ADAPTED SCREENPLAY and ORIGINAL SCREENPLAY
text: Winner: One Battle After Another written by Paul Thomas Anderson. The prediction is presented as decisive. Anderson's screenplay has achieved an unprecedented sweep across all major precursor awards: Paul Thomas Anderson's One Battle After Another is the first screenplay to sweep all precursors (Critics Choice, Golden Globe, BAFTA, WGA plus USC) since 2010's The Social Network. The analyst emphasizes the dominance of this frontrunner, stating there is virtually no room for an upset in either category. Any alternative winner would constitute a significant shock to the awards season. The remaining nominees ranked include: Hamnet as runner-up (Focus Features) with Chloé Zhao & Maggie O'Farrell; Bugonia in third place (Focus Features) with Will Tracy; Train Dreams (Netflix) with Clint Bentley & Greg Kwedar in fourth; and Frankenstein (Netflix) with Guillermo del Toro in fifth. While these films earned recognition from various critics' organizations, none achieved the comprehensive precursor dominance required to challenge Anderson's frontrunner status.
